familyName.title: Family Name
familyName.description: The current last name(s) or surname(s) of the person.

givenName.title: Given name
givenName.description: The current first and middle name(s) of the person, if applicable.

birthDate.title: Date of birth
birthDate.description: The person’s date of birth (day, month, and year).

birthPlace.title: Place of birth
birthPlace.description: The person’s place of birth (country code or local area).

residentAddress.title: Resident address
residentAddress.description: The complete address where the person currently lives or can be reached (street, number, city, etc.).

residentState.title: Resident state
residentState.description: The person’s current state, province, district, or local area.

residentCity.title: Resident city
residentCity.description: The person’s current municipality, city, town, or village.

residentHouseNumber.title: Resident house number
residentHouseNumber.description: The person’s current house number (including any suffix).

familyNameBirth.title: Family name at birth
familyNameBirth.description: The person’s birth last name(s) or surname(s).

givenNameBirth.title: Given name at birth
givenNameBirth.description: The person’s birth first and middle name(s).

mobilePhoneNumber.title: Phone number
mobilePhoneNumber.description: The person’s mobile number in international format (starting with '+' and country code).

expiryDate.title: Expiry date
expiryDate.description: The date (and, if available, time) when the person’s identification data expires.

issuanceDate.title: Issuance date
issuanceDate.description: The date (and, if available, time) when the person’s identification data was issued or became valid.

personalAdministrativeNumber.title: Personal administrative number
personalAdministrativeNumber.description: A unique personal number assigned to the person by the identification data provider, with usage policies defined by the issuing authority.

issuingAuthority.title: Issuing authority
issuingAuthority.description: The issuing authority of the person’s identification data, or the country code if no specific authority exists.

documentNumber.title: Document number
documentNumber.description: The identification number assigned to the person by the data provider.

issuingJurisdiction.title: Issuing jurisdiction
issuingJurisdiction.description: The issuing jurisdiction’s subdivision code (ISO 3166-2:2020), with the first part matching the issuing country.

trustAnchor.title: Trust anchor
trustAnchor.description: The URL where the machine-readable trust anchor for verifying the person’s identification data is freely available.
